review_scope: Review whether the starter lifecycle demo now makes launch and post-release learning explicit enough for onboarding use.

target_outcomes.expected_signal: A new workspace owner should see one explicit launch communication artifact tied to the same seeded lifecycle item.
target_outcomes.observed_signal: The starter demo now includes one release note linked directly to the canonical seeded item trace.

target_outcomes.expected_signal: A new workspace owner should see one explicit outcome review tied to the same lifecycle trace.
target_outcomes.observed_signal: The starter demo now includes one outcome review linked to the same canonical seeded item and launch evidence.

claim_verification_summary: The starter trace now demonstrates launch and post-release linkage, but it remains explicitly seeded onboarding content rather than product truth.
adoption_notes: The starter demo now shows the whole lifecycle from intake through post-release learning.
Teams should replace the seeded launch and outcome text with product-specific evidence when adopting the template.
unresolved_pain_points: External publication adapters remain outside the starter demo scope.

support_signals.summary: The starter example is easier to review because launch and outcome artifacts are attached to the same lifecycle item.

adoption_signals.summary: A new workspace owner can now inspect one explicit launch and outcome path without reconstructing the lifecycle manually.

reopen_recommendations.rationale: Teams should review whether the next starter improvement still belongs in lifecycle readability before broadening the surface.

next_action: Use the starter full-lifecycle trace as the onboarding baseline, then replace the seeded evidence with product-specific launch and outcome artifacts.
